bird.name: 水蒲苇莺
bird.summary: 水蒲苇莺（学名：Acrocephalus schoenobaenus）又称蒲苇莺，为鶲科苇莺属的鸟类，主要分布在欧洲到中亚之间的地区，冬季时则迁徙到撒哈拉以南非洲越冬。在中国大陆，分布于新疆等地。该物种的模式产地在瑞典。 参考文献

locations.name: 撒哈拉沙漠
locations.summary: 撒哈拉沙漠（阿拉伯語：الصحراء الكبرى，aṣ-Ṣaḥrāʾ al-Kubrā ， 清朝直譯大沙漠）位於非洲大陸北部，是世界最热的荒漠，亦是世界第三大荒漠，仅次于南极和北极，同时也是世界上最大的沙漠，其总面积超过9,400,00…

locations.name: 塞内加尔
locations.summary: 塞内加尔共和国（法語：République du Sénégal），通稱塞內加爾（法語：Sénégal），是西非国家，位于塞内加尔河的南岸，首都达喀尔。它的西边是大西洋，北边是毛里塔尼亚，东边是馬利，南边是几内亚和几内亚比绍。冈比亚在塞内…

locations.name: 纳米比亚

relations.subject: 水蒲苇莺
relations.evidence: Sedge warblers are migratory, crossing the Sahara to get from their European and Asian breeding grounds to spend winter in Africa

relations.subject: 水蒲苇莺
relations.evidence: Poyser | location = London, UK | year = 2002 | pages = 544–547 | isbn = 978-0-7136-6514-7}} All sedge warblers spend winter in sub-Saharan Africa, from Senegal in the west to Ethiopia in the east, and as far south as the eastern Cape Province of South Africa and northern Namibia

relations.subject: 水蒲苇莺
relations.evidence: Birds ringed in the United Kingdom and Netherlands are later found from south-west Iberia to Italy; birds from Sweden are recovered in central Europe and Italy; while Finnish birds are found in north-east Italy and Malta east to the Aegean region

relations.subject: 水蒲苇莺
relations.evidence: Though it is often found in wetlands, it can breed or more away from water. During the breeding season, this is a species found in reedbeds, often with scrub, ditches and habitats away from water including hedgerows, patches of stinging nettles, and arable crops.{{Cite book | last = Tucker | first = Graham M
